name: What are the risks if my law firm ignores AEO?
description: Lost leads, competitors dominate AI; act fast.[4][7]

mainEntity.name: What are the risks if my law firm ignores AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost leads, competitors dominate AI; act fast.[4][7]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Firms ignoring AEO lose 70%+ of AI-driven traffic to optimized rivals, shrinking client pipelines.**[4][7] AI reshapes discovery, sidelining non-EEAT sites.[3][7] **Key factors:** 1. Clients get instant AI answers elsewhere. 2. No recourse for 'invisibility.' 3. Wasted prior SEO investment. **Pivot now: allocate 10% marketing to GEO experiments in Phoenix.** Risk is obsolescence.[3]
